chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.Mis.Appln.No.S-266 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 06.06.2018. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, advocate holding brief for Mr. Allah Bux Shar, advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, APG. = Mr. Zaheer Abbas Kharal, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.4, which is taken on record. It is stated by him that FIR bearing crime No.33 of 2018 under Sections 324, 337-H(ii), A(i), L(ii), F-(iii), 148, 149, 504 PPC of P.S Bandhi has already been registered. By intimating so, he submitted Photostat copy of such FIR, which is also taken on record. After recording of FIR, the instant petition apparently has become infructuous. Mr. Aijaz Ali Bhutto, advocate holding brief on behalf of learned counsel for applicant consented for disposal of instant Criminal Misc. Application. In view of above, the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application on having become infructuous is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
